text: Several brown bears standing in the snow next to a green cage.
The woman is working on one of her laptops on the desk.
Boy mimicking baseball batter's stance with rolled up paper.
A person with food standing in a room.
Two large brown dogs sleeping on a bed.

A variety of items including books, food and a bag.

A small purple flower in a vase resembles a firework exploding.
